title: Transfer file from file column in a board to file column in another board using Integromat

posts.author: Vestec (Stian Osmundsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

I would like to gather files from several boards into one master board.
All of these boards have project numbers and I would use search feature to identify the right project and collect all files in a project in the master board.

I have transferred the file from update to file column in each board.
Problem is to get the file from file column from one board to the master board.

Anyone has a good recipe for a similar operation?

posts.author: magic_maker (Mircea Clitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
You can try it with link column/mirror column. But I have the same issue and my users don’t have access on all boards and this doesn’t work for me. I would like a feature like send file/copy file from this file column and board to that file column and board.
Have a great day!
